VpcNicParams.floating_ip_id: Floating IP ID; unique identifier associated with the floating IP
VpcNicParams.vpc_subnet_id: VPC subnet ID; unique identifier of the associated VPC subnet
VpcNicParams.vpc_id: VPC ID; unique identifier of the associated VPC

UpdateVpcNicPayloads.floating_ip_id: Floating IP ID; unique identifier associated with the floating IP
UpdateVpcNicPayloads.vpc_subnet_id: VPC subnet ID; unique identifier of the associated VPC subnet

NestedVirtualPrivateCloudExternalSubnet.nat_gateway_cidr: NAT gateway address block specified from the CIDR block
NestedVirtualPrivateCloudExternalSubnet.router_gateway_cidr: Routing gateway address block specified from the CIDR block

/update-vm-vpc-nic.description: Used to update the VPC, subnet, floating IP, and IP address configuration of a VM's VPC NIC.
